---
name: Bug report
about: Something on a player card, squad, or export is broken or wrong
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Affected URL

The exact profile or squad URL where you saw this (required — most bugs here are data- or render-specific to one
profile/repo, so this is the single most useful thing you can give us):

`https://transfergit.com/USERNAME` or `https://transfergit.com/squad/OWNER/REPO`

If it's an export image specifically, paste the full image URL (e.g. `/api/og/USERNAME/card` or
`/api/svg/squad/OWNER/REPO?formation=442`) instead of just the page.

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to see instead.

## Screenshot / recording

If it's visual (layout, a broken export, a misplaced chip on the pitch), a screenshot or short recording makes
this much faster to diagnose than a description alone.

## Environment

- Browser + OS (only relevant for a live-page bug, not an export image):
- Device (desktop / mobile / tablet):

## Additional context

Anything else — did it work before? Only happens for repos above a certain size? Only in one export theme?
